description: An absent version marker conservatively produces a non-disclosing stale-ruleset result for every codex rule; the unrecognized persistence value uses the non-disclosing fallback while the other rules' unset values are quoted verbatim (their unset rendering discloses no configured content).

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective usage analytics telemetry posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: analytics.enabled unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: tool version not detected — no version marker found on PATH
